heading: Company Orders
intro: Let your colleagues and workplace bloom with flowers for both everyday moments and special occasions. Order locally from Boulevardens Blomster and make it easy to send a thoughtful greeting.
deliveryNote: Free delivery and a flower card with text apply only to businesses and their employees in Taastrup Municipality.
contactNote: For larger orders and other enquiries, please contact us at:

bouquets.name: Payment test
bouquets.description: Temporary test product for verifying live payment, webhook delivery and order emails. It will be removed after testing.

bouquets.name: Just Because...
bouquets.description: A spontaneous bouquet sent simply to bring a smile and some warmth to someone special.

bouquets.name: Welcome Back!
bouquets.description: A warm welcome bouquet to celebrate someone's return and lift the mood at work.

bouquets.name: Congratulations!
bouquets.description: Celebrate happy milestones with a bouquet that feels festive and easy to give.

bouquets.name: Love
bouquets.description: A warm and caring bouquet for the moments when feelings should be shown in a simple, beautiful way.

bouquets.name: Seasonal Flowers - Compact
bouquets.description: Colourful seasonal flowers gathered in a compact bouquet that suits many occasions.

bouquets.name: Seasonal Flowers - Airy
bouquets.description: Colourful seasonal flowers in a tall and airy bouquet with an inviting feel.

form.cardTextLabel: Optional: Add text for card (free - max 50 words)
form.companyCodeLabel: Company code (contact us if you don't have one)
form.invoiceEmailLabel: If Invoice is selected, please enter the company email.
form.confirmationNote: You will receive an email confirmation. For invoice orders we send payment details manually.
form.successBody: We have received your order and will send a confirmation by email.
form.cancelledBody: You can review the order and try the payment again.
